apigateway.apikey.CustomerId.Docs: An AWS Marketplace customer identifier to use when integrating with the AWS SaaS Marketplace.

apigateway.apikey.Description.Docs: A description of the purpose of the API key.

apigateway.apikey.Enabled.Docs: Indicates whether the API key can be used by clients.

apigateway.apikey.GenerateDistinctId.Docs: Specifies whether the key identifier is distinct from the created API key value. This parameter is deprecated and should not be used.

apigateway.apikey.Name.Docs: A name for the API key. If you don't specify a name, AWS CloudFormation generates a unique physical ID and uses that ID for the API key name. For more information, see [Name Type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-name.html).  If you specify a name, you cannot perform updates that require replacement of this resource. You can perform updates that require no or some interruption. If you must replace the resource, specify a new name.

apigateway.apikey.StageKeys.Docs: A list of stages to associate with this API key.

apigateway.apikey.Tags.Docs: An array of arbitrary tags (key-value pairs) to associate with the API key.

apigateway.apikey.Value.Docs: The value of the API key. Must be at least 20 characters long.
